about_item: Dimensions: 17.5"L x 11"W x 11"H, suitable for pet up to 15 lbs.Please do not choose your carrier based on weight--please reference your pet's length and height in selecting a carrier size
Easy to set up and fold down flat for storage. Original metal frame when you carry it within your dog or cats
Two entrances, easy to access. Unzip top entrance, pet can poke their head out
Travel carrier for medium cats and puppy: AIRLINE APPROVED;can be secured in car seat and fastened on luggage
Carrying handles and adjustable shoulder strap, easy for you to carry. It also comes with a cozy fleece pad and mesh windows for ventilation, your pet could breathe fresh air and enjoy the view

summary.text: Customers find this pet carrier to be sturdy and well-made, particularly suitable for larger cats, with solid straps and collapsible design for easy storage. The carrier is roomy enough for one larger cat, comfortable to carry on shoulders and back, and easy to slide pets into. Customers appreciate that it fits perfectly under seats and in luggage, and consider it good value for money.

insights.title: Quality
insights.summary: Customers find this pet carrier to be of good quality, describing it as the best they have used.

examples.snippet: This is a great carrier at a great price. It's roomy enough for a small dog or a large cat, has a carpeted insert that serves as the floor....
Lightweight but very sturdy for my 12lb cat. He likes it much better than the hardside carrier and it's easy for me to carry with the shoulder strap.
Just opened it and they both want in already. Well made, good construction, lots of zippers and ventilation, and a sweet cushy Sherpa cushion floor.
Used this for my 10lb cat. Good quality and sturdy. I have to leave the carrier out because my cats like to hangout in it as well lol

examples.snippet: Not too heavy and easy to carry. I used it to transport puppies on a flight that was quite long. They were comfortable and quiet the whole way

Great for traveling, comes with a soft cushion so cat can be comfy.

authors_reviews.title: Sturdy, lightweight, well made!
authors_reviews.text: I searched in many pet stores and online for a sturdy carrier with a safe top for my big boys, just one and two years old, weighing 10.9 lbs and 11.7 pounds already! My previous carrier only zipped on 3 sides on top, the fourth side was held by velcro. My kitty almost escaped from the top, quite frightening! This brand solved my numerous problems! The top zipped tight on all four sides. The carrier stayed firm and straight once the side zippers were zipped. My boys had plenty of room inside, to turn around and lay down. Plenty of firm screening to allow for air flow and letting my boys look outside the carrier. The size and color were both perfect and it was not heavy! Bonus for my injured arm!! I am very happy and satisfied with this carrrier.!!!
authors_reviews.author: Sharon Kolupski

authors_reviews.title: Best carrier I ever got
authors_reviews.text: I had to get a carrier for my kitty rather quickly, as I had to leave for a flight with her in a tight timeframe. I'm glad I went with this one. It's so easy to collapse, and set back up again each time she goes to the vet. It was so easy to carry through the airport and onto the planes, and fit rather snugly on the plane. The bottom you insert is very soft and comfortable. There is very good ventilation and I like the fact you can either load kitty in through the top mesh, which unzips, or the front--depending on which way is easier for your cat, lol. It's easy to clean and holds up perfectly, and has the cross-body strap (which I love) as well as a handle you can velcro together. There is also a bonus pocket in the back to conveniently hold any important papers or supplies.The sides which open out are awesome. There's a lot of good ventilation and air and space to give my kitty when I open it up. It's nice if you would like to give them breathing room and even take them outside to enjoy the sun and fresh air. I once took her to the park and opened up the sides, and we just relaxed there for awhile. I'm sure with a dog they'd totally love that too.It's a really great carrier. It's not cold and hard and uncomfortable. Definitely recommend this one!
authors_reviews.author: Des

authors_reviews.title: Amazing carrier
authors_reviews.text: First carrier I purchased as a new cat owner. Was a little nervous at first since I had never had to transport a cat before and was just relying on reviews, but so glad I did! When I first got this carrier my little kitten was only 4lbs and now he is almost 10lbs. He has gone on many car rides in this carrier, some over 2 hours long, and still seems very comfortable despite having grown a lot over the past few months. My vet also commented on this carrier, saying that she really liked the way it was built and that it seemed to be good quality. The mesh is sturdy and he has scratched at it a few times but has not been able to rip through it. I have yet to try it out on a plane, but I purchased the medium (without expandable sides) and it looks like it should fit under a plane seat fine. It is has been over 6 months and this carrier still looks great and will likely hold up for a long time.05/08/2020 UPDATE:Still going strong! My cat is full-grown now at 11 lbs and seems very comfortable. I use this often because I take my cat out on errands to keep him used to his harness and being in his carrier. I use the longer shoulder strap to hook around the headrest of the passenger seat so it functions as a carseat. The clip leash inside is awesome because I can open the top so he can stretch but not have him roam all over the car while I drive and I love the little pocket on the side. Even with regular use for 9 months it is showing no signs of significant wear or tear. Mesh has no holes, seams are all still completely intact, straps are very strong. At this rate I do not anticipate needing to replace this for the next couple years and I could not recommend this product enough.
authors_reviews.author: m.amazoncustomer

authors_reviews.title: Great Pet Carrier
authors_reviews.text: I purchased this carrier for my new kitten and I am impressed overall. The material seems extremely sturdy and the base is very soft and seems comfortable. There is a pocked on the side that is perfect for some food, treats, or anything else your fur baby may need. There is also a lead attached to the inside, so you can hook your baby in to keep them safe. The top and the side open for easy access to your pet. Carrier folds down for easy storage, but once the sides are zipped up it is very sturdy and not flimsy. I love the color and the leather handle on top. So far, I highly recommend this carrier and think it will be perfect for bringing my new baby home and transporting her to and from the vet.
authors_reviews.author: Madison

other_countries_reviews.title: Can fit a ragdoll cat in it!
other_countries_reviews.text: Bought the medium carrier with side compartments. Very nice bag, did not take me long to figure out how to release the side compartments.Can fit an adult male ragdoll cat just fine even when the side compartments are not released, though I wished it was more spacious since he’s pretty big and the large size does not come with the side compartments. The whole bag does tend to collapse when not in used.The other day, I took my ragdoll out for a little outdoor excursion using this carrier. I unzipped the front sleeve so he could sniff some flowers. It was also convenient for me to stick my hand in to pet him while journeying through the park.
other_countries_reviews.author: Fiona

other_countries_reviews.title: Excellent product
other_countries_reviews.text: This travel bag is excellent. I brought 2 when we were relocating bag to U.K. My cats had never travelled before and despite some vigorous protests from both of them they held up really well. They didn’t fit under the seat of the plane despite being the correct size but the cabin crew didn’t say anything so all was well. They are easy to assemble and lightweight and once my cats had settled they seemed quite comfortable in them. They fold nice and flat when not in use so are also easy to store. All in all a really good product that I would happily recommend.
other_countries_reviews.author: cheryl lee

other_countries_reviews.title: Me encanto el producto
other_countries_reviews.text: Mi nena esta feliz con su transportadora, pesa aprox. 7.30 kilos es un poodle de raza pequeña
other_countries_reviews.author: Cliente de Amazon
